basic_details.job_title: JNV Nakane Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 21 PGT, TGT and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: PM Shri Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Nakane (JNV Nakane)
basic_details.short_information: PM Shri Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Nakane (JNV Nakane) PGT, TGT and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website navodaya.gov.in. A total of 21 vacancies have been announced through the JNV Nakane PGT, TGT and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree with 50% + B.Ed. for PGTs, Bachelor Degree with 50% + B.Ed. + CTET for TGTs, Class 10 for Matron, Graduation + Typing for JSA/Clerk, Diploma in Cosmetology for Skill Teacher
qualification.details: PGT Physics: Master Degree in Physics with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. PGT Mathematics: Master Degree in Mathematics with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. TGT English: Bachelor's/Honors Degree in English with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. TGT PET Female: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with 50% marks from NCTE recognized institution. Matron: Class 10 pass, married female (widows/divorcees without encumbrances preferred). PGT Geography: Master Degree in Geography with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. TGT Mathematics: Bachelor's/Honors Degree in Mathematics with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. TGT Hindi: Bachelor's/Honors Degree in Hindi with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. TGT Computer Science: BCA/B.Sc. (CS/IT)/BE/B.Tech (CS/IT) with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. PGT Chemistry: Master Degree in Chemistry with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. PGT Biology: Master Degree in Biological Science/Life Science with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. Skill Teacher (Beauty & Wellness): Diploma/Certificate Course in Cosmetology/Beauty Therapy/Beauty Culture from recognized institution. TGT Science: Bachelor's/Honors Degree in Science (Biology/Life Science) with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. JSA/Clerk: Graduation with knowledge of computer application + English (35 wpm) and Hindi (25 wpm) typing.

salary_details.pay_scale: PGT: 35750/-, TGT: 34125/-, Skill Teacher: 30000/-, Matron: Minimum wages for unskilled MTS, JSA/Clerk: Minimum wages for skilled/clerical

content_sections.heading: JNV Nakane Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JNV Nakane Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JNV Nakane Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PGT Physics: Master Degree in Physics with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. PGT Mathematics: Master Degree in Mathematics with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. TGT English: Bachelor's/Honors Degree in English with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. TGT PET Female: Bachelor's Degree in Physical Education with 50% marks from NCTE recognized institution. Matron: Class 10 pass, married female (widows/divorcees without encumbrances preferred). PGT Geography: Master Degree in Geography with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. TGT Mathematics: Bachelor's/Honors Degree in Mathematics with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. TGT Hindi: Bachelor's/Honors Degree in Hindi with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. TGT Computer Science: BCA/B.Sc. (CS/IT)/BE/B.Tech (CS/IT) with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. PGT Chemistry: Master Degree in Chemistry with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. PGT Biology: Master Degree in Biological Science/Life Science with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE recognized institution. Skill Teacher (Beauty & Wellness): Diploma/Certificate Course in Cosmetology/Beauty Therapy/Beauty Culture from recognized institution. TGT Science: Bachelor's/Honors Degree in Science (Biology/Life Science) with 50% marks + B.Ed. or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. JSA/Clerk: Graduation with knowledge of computer application + English (35 wpm) and Hindi (25 wpm) typing.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for JNV Nakane Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by JNV Nakane?
faq.answer: JNV Nakane has announced a total of 21 vacancies for various posts including PGT, TGT, Matron, JSA, and Skill Teacher.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 15 July 2026. Candidates should report by the specified time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the PGT/TGT/Matron/JSA/Skill Teacher posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 50 years.

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for JNV Nakane Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for PGT posts?
faq.answer: For PGT posts, candidates need to have a Master Degree with 50% marks and a B.Ed. or equivalent qualification from an NCTE recognized institution.

faq.question: Q7. Is CTET qualification mandatory for TGT posts?
faq.answer: Yes, CTET Paper-II is mandatory for TGT posts along with a Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks and a B.Ed. or equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Matron post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Matron post will be as per the minimum wages for unskilled MTS.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, category certificate if applicable), and a duly filled application form if required.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for JNV Nakane Recruitment 2026 being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is being held at PM Shri Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Nakane, located in Dhule, Maharashtra.
